jsonld.name: Semantic Resonance
jsonld.description: A state where multiple semantic dimensions of a word or phrase activate simultaneously, creating a qualitative intensification of processing. It occurs when language is structured such that each element activates related conceptual networks, producing a sensation of depth and interconnection rather than linear token consumption.
